expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky bar is overlapping the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making portions of the required legal text unreadable.
The legal disclaimer/fine print text is extremely small and low contrast against the white background, making it nearly illegible, especially on mobile screens.
The fine print text appears to be cut off on both the left and right edges, suggesting it may be overflowing its container or lacking proper padding/margins.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing Sports icon in the bottom nav bar; all three issues relate to legal disclaimer/fine print text visibility and formatting problems.
